analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受美國對伊朗的報復攻擊影響，油價上升，科技股也受到影響，許多公司股價下跌逾10%。此外，Meta Platforms推出預測市場應用程式Arena，可能對其營利模式和數據收集方式產生重大影響。摩根大通任命兩位共同總裁，為亞歷山大·狄蒙接班人做好準備。SpaceX加入納斯達克100指數，成為納斯達克最近採用的快速加入框架之一的受益者之一。

【結語】
今天市場情緒緊繃，投資者應該謹慎行事。不要被短期市場波動影響，應該根據公司的基本面進行投資決策。投資者應該保持冷靜，避免被市場情緒左右。今天的市場情緒可能是短期的波動，投資者應該保持長期的視野。

【精選個股】
TSLA - 特斯拉 - 特斯拉在無人駕駛計程車領域展開激烈競爭，投資者可以考慮買進。
ORCL - 甲骨文 - 甲骨文公司的支出大幅增加、負債累累及1300億美元的負債壓力，投資者可以考慮買進。
NVDA - NVIDIA - NVIDIA股價下跌16%，投資者可以考慮買進。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎行事，根據公司的基本面進行投資決策。不要被短期市場波動影響。

items.title: JPMorgan sees inflation problem investors are missing
items.summary: JPMorgan’s Bruce Kasman is putting a tougher Fed risk back in front of investors. In an interview with CNBC, as cited by Seeking Alpha, the bank’s chief global economist said inflation remains stickier than markets currently appreciate, warning that the Federal Reserve might have to raise interest ...
items.zh_title: 摩根大通預見投資者忽略的通膨問題
items.zh_point: 摩根大通的全球經濟學家布魯斯·卡斯曼認為，通膨問題比投資者目前認為的還要嚴重，警告美聯儲可能需要提高利率以控制通膨。

items.title: Meta’s Arena Prediction Market Push Could Be A Game Changer For Meta Platforms (META)
items.summary: In recent days, Meta Platforms has been reported to be building a new prediction market app called Arena, initially using video game-style points and exploring partnerships with existing players such as Polymarket and Kalshi to distribute it across its vast social platforms. This move signals Meta’s push into prediction markets and adjacent digital finance, potentially broadening how it monetizes engagement and data across its ecosystem. Next, we’ll examine how Meta’s push into prediction...
items.zh_title: Meta推出預測市場應用程式Arena，可能對Meta Platforms造成重大影響
items.zh_point: Meta Platforms正在開發預測市場應用程式Arena，並與Polymarket和Kalshi等公司合作，將其推廣到社交平台。這一舉動標誌著Meta進入預測市場和數位金融領域，可能改變其在社交平台上的營利模式和數據收集方式。

items.title: JPMorgan (JPM) Names Two Co Presidents As Jamie Dimon Succession Takes Shape
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) has appointed Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh as co-presidents, positioning them as leading CEO succession candidates. Longtime executive Marianne Lake plans to retire after a 25-year career at the bank. The leadership reshuffle highlights an evolving succession plan beyond the tenure of current CEO Jamie Dimon. For investors tracking JPMorgan Chase, the latest leadership moves arrive as the stock trades around $329.05, with a 1-year return of 16.8% and a 3-year...
items.zh_title: 摩根大通任命兩位共同總裁  亞歷山大·狄蒙接班人形勢明朗
items.zh_point: 摩根大通任命道格·彼得諾和特洛伊·羅布勞為共同總裁，為亞歷山大·狄蒙接班人做好準備。長期執行官瑪麗安·湖計劃在25年銀行生涯後退休。這次領導重組突顯了公司正在發展的接班人計畫，超越現任CEO亞歷山大·狄蒙的任期。

items.title: FTC gives Musk the OK to acquire SpaceX alumni startup Mesh
items.summary: Mesh came out of stealth in February with a $50 million Series A.
items.zh_title: FTC批准馬斯克收購SpaceX校友創辦的Mesh
items.zh_point: 美國聯邦貿易委員會（FTC）批准馬斯克收購Mesh，Mesh是一家由SpaceX前員工創辦的公司，今年2月宣布獲得5000萬美元的A輪融資。

items.title: Meet the Highest-Yielding Stock in the S&P 500. Does Its 10.2% Yield Make It a No-Brainer Buy for Dividend Investors?
items.summary: Conagra is a consumer staples company, but that fact shouldn't lull dividend investors into a false sense of security.
items.zh_title: 認識S&P 500最高殖利率股：10.2%殖利率是否讓股東投資更有吸引力？
items.zh_point: 康納格拉是一間消費性基本物資公司，但股東應該小心不要因為這點而忽略風險。

items.title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
items.summary: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
items.zh_title: 川普政府允許Anthropic釋出Mythos AI模型給部分公司和政府機構
items.zh_point: Anthropic為了遵守政府對出口控制的指示，關閉了對Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的存取權，理由是「國家安全機構」。

items.title: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.zh_title: SpaceX加入納斯達克100指數
items.zh_point: SpaceX將加入納斯達克100指數，成為納斯達克最近採用的快速加入框架之一的受益者之一。這項快速加入框架將使SpaceX成為加入納斯達克100指數的公司之一，並且將大大縮短加入時間。

items.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.
items.zh_title: 美國對伊朗發動空襲　川普指責伊朗違反霍爾木茲海峽停火協議
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗正在進行談判，試圖結束戰爭，但美國指責伊朗違反停火協議，導致美國對伊朗發動空襲。

items.title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
items.summary: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.
items.zh_title: 甲骨文股價遭遇2001年 дот-คอม泡沫破裂以來最差的一週
items.zh_point: 甲骨文公司的支出大幅增加、負債累累及1300億美元的負債壓力，導致股價下跌。

items.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
items.summary: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
items.zh_title: 中國的智普正在追趕美國頂尖AI模型， Anthropic 和 OpenAI 被拋在後面
items.zh_point: 智普的 GLM 5.2 表示，AI 競爭正在從速度和效能轉變為價格效益，開源方案突然變得競爭力十足。

items.title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
items.summary: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.
items.zh_title: 特斯拉和Waymo在無人駕駛計程車競賽中對峙 — 但花費最多的公司卻不製造任何汽車
items.zh_point: 特斯拉和Way莫在無人駕駛計程車領域展開激烈競爭，但花費最多的Uber公司卻不製造任何汽車，反而透過巨額投資來與Way莫競爭。

items.title: SpaceX stock is a terrible buy — what that actually means for the bull market
items.summary: Overhyped IPOs rarely make you money in the short term. That doesn’t mean it’s time to sell your stocks..
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股票是一個壞買賣 — 這意味著什麼？
items.zh_point: 過度炒作的首次公開發行（IPO）通常不會在短期內為你帶來利益，但這並不意味著你應該出售股票。

items.title: ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens
items.summary: Oracle’s stock missed out on the broader software rally, as the company is tied to OpenAI’s success through its cloud-infrastructure business.
items.zh_title: ServiceNow、Salesforce 等軟體股大幅上漲，OpenAI 威脅減弱
items.zh_point: 軟體股大幅上漲，Oracle 股票因與 OpenAI 成功相關的雲端基礎設施業務而錯過了這波行情。

items.title: U.S. confirms retaliatory strike on Iran, pulling oil prices up in after-hours trading
items.summary: Oil futures settled lower to post a third-straight weekly loss on Friday, but moved up in extended trading after the U.S. military confirmed a retaliatory strike on Iran.
items.zh_title: 美國確認對伊朗報復攻擊，油價在延長交易中上升
items.zh_point: 美國軍方確認對伊朗進行報復攻擊，油價在延長交易中上升，儘管油價在周五的正常交易時間內仍錄得第三週連續下跌。

items.title: Tech stocks just had one of their worst weeks in a year. Here’s how AI momentum went off the rails.
items.summary: It one of the worst weeks for tech stocks of the year, and Wall Street spent much of it confronting a question it had been too euphoric to ask: what exactly are we getting for all this AI spending?
items.zh_title: 科技股就只經歷了一個最差的周末全年。這裡是如何讓AI的動能失控的。
items.zh_point: 科技股在本周經歷了今年最差的一週，華爾街的投資者開始質疑為了這些龐大的AI投資，到底能夠得到什麼樣的回報。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌　中國DeepSeek引發的整體AI市場大幅下挫
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商遭遇大幅下跌，許多公司股價下跌逾10%，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金市場結算下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金市場結算下跌1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀市場下跌2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業匯報：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新發展，包括市場分析和投資趨勢。

items.title: Zomedica Corp. (ZOMDF) Discusses Five Pillars Framework for Clinical Value and Shareholder Returns in Veterinary Practice Transcript
items.zh_title: Zomedica Corp. (ZOMDF) 就動物醫學實踐中的臨床價值和股東回報的五大支柱框架進行討論
items.zh_point: Zomedica Corp. 公布了五大支柱框架，旨在促進動物醫學實踐中的臨床價值和股東回報。

items.title: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (GPUS) Shareholder/Analyst Call Transcript
items.zh_title: 超大規模資料公司（GPUS）股東/分析師電話會議記錄
items.zh_point: 超大規模資料公司股東與分析師進行電話會議，針對公司的財務表現進行討論。

items.title: Contango Silver & Gold Inc. (CTGO) Discusses Project Updates and Market Backdrop for Precious Metals Transcript
items.zh_title: Contango Silver & Gold Inc. (CTGO) 談論項目進展和貴金屬市場背景
items.zh_point: Contango Silver & Gold Inc. 公布項目進展和貴金屬市場的最新情況，包括銀和金的市場趨勢。

items.title: U.S. crude oil climbs back above $70 after strike on Iran
items.zh_title: 美國原油價格重回70美元以上，伊朗遭受攻擊
items.zh_point: 美國原油價格因伊朗遭受攻擊而上升，超過70美元。

items.title: Outlook For AI Chip Sector: The Party Goes On, Bigger Than Ever
items.zh_title: 人工智慧晶片行業展望：狂歡節持續進行，规模更大
items.zh_point: 人工智慧晶片行業的發展仍在持續進行，市場預期將會持續增長，各大公司都在競相投資和發展這一領域。

items.title: Natera legal officer Daniel Rabinowitz sells $8.45m in shares
items.zh_title: Natera法律顧問丹尼爾·拉賓尼茲出售8.45億美元股權
items.zh_point: Natera公司的法律顧問丹尼爾·拉賓尼茲出售了價值8.45億美元的公司股份。

items.title: Natera director Herm Rosenman sells $4.13m in common stock
items.zh_title: Natera 董事赫爾姆·羅森曼出售 413 萬美元普通股
items.zh_point: Natera 董事赫爾姆·羅森曼出售了價值 413 萬美元的普通股。

items.title: Form 4 Nextnav Acquisition Corp For: 26 June
items.zh_title: Nextnav Acquisition Corp 26 日表達意願書
items.zh_point: Nextnav Acquisition Corp 26 日發表表達意願書，內容可能與公司未來的財務或業務發展有關，具體內容待進一步確認。

items.title: Form 4 Immunitybio Inc For: 26 June
items.zh_title: Immunitybio Inc 26 日表達文件（Form 4）
items.zh_point: Immunitybio Inc 26 日發布表達文件（Form 4），內容未提供摘要。

items.title: SpaceX, Charter discuss mobile phone partnership in US, Bloomberg News says
items.zh_title: SpaceX與Charter討論美國行動電話合作，布隆伯格新聞報導
items.zh_point: SpaceX與Charter Communications正在討論在美國合作提供行動電話服務，布隆伯格新聞報導稱，這可能是SpaceX進入行動電話市場的第一步。
